cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are more than 5 years old and weigh more than 12 kg. The data is given in a table, so I should probably go through each penguin one by one and check their age and weight. First, let me list out all the penguins with their details. The header is name, age, height, weight. So the penguins are: 1. Louis: age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. 2. Bernard: age 5, height 80 cm, weight 13 kg. 3. Vincent: age 9, height 60 cm, weight 11 kg. 4. Gwen: age 8, height 70 cm, weight 15 kg. Now, the criteria are two-fold: age must be more than 5 and weight more than 12 kg.
